Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.accessories: black silver-inlaid ebony cane, bronze revolver with wooden grip in an underarm holster
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions his usual brownish-yellow coat, his purchase of the ebony cane, and him wearing the revolver in an underarm holster.
